name: Aries
headline: Aries represents the initial impulse
description: Drive, courage and the need to act. It expresses the force of beginnings and the ability to set off without waiting.

name: Taurus
headline: Taurus represents stability
description: Grounding, steadiness and the search for security. It speaks of the relationship to the body, to pleasures and to what lasts over time.

name: Gemini
headline: Gemini represents exchange
description: Curiosity, movement and communication. They show how the mind observes, connects and shares information.

name: Cancer
headline: Cancer represents protection
description: Sensitivity, attachment and the need for emotional security. It speaks of the inner home and emotional roots.

name: Leo
headline: Leo represents self-expression
description: Creativity, pride and the need to shine. It shows how the individual asserts their presence and seeks recognition.

name: Virgo
headline: Virgo represents discernment
description: Analysis, precision and an eye for detail. It expresses the need to understand, improve and make things useful.

name: Libra
headline: Libra represents balance
description: Relationship, the search for harmony and a sense of justice. It shows how the bond with others is built.

name: Scorpio
headline: Scorpio represents depth
description: Intensity, transformation and confronting the essential. It invites us to move through what is hidden in order to renew ourselves.

name: Sagittarius
headline: Sagittarius represents the quest for meaning
description: Exploration, broadening of vision and the search for truth. It speaks of the need to understand the world as a whole.

name: Capricorn
headline: Capricorn represents construction
description: Responsibility, endurance and mastery of time. It shows how we build something solid and lasting.

name: Aquarius
headline: Aquarius represents the collective vision
description: Independence, innovation and the need for change. It expresses the ability to think differently and step outside the norms.

name: Pisces
headline: Pisces represent an all-encompassing sensitivity
description: Empathy, imagination and the dissolution of boundaries. They speak of the connection to the subtle and the universal.
